location: A farmable drop from Lesser Mad Pumpkin Head enemies, scattered across several spots in Liurnia rather than one fixed location.
tactics: Known spawn clusters: north of Foot of the Four Belfries, southwest of Road of Iniquity Side Path, and just outside Fort Haight (before the fort is cleared)
Lesser Mad Pumpkin Heads aren't especially dangerous — a reasonable early/mid Liurnia farm target
No boss fight required — repeat kills until it drops
lore: An oversized, heavy iron flail favored by the Mad Pumpkin Heads — bulkier than a standard Flail, built to be swung with brute force rather than finesse.

builds.name: Pure Strength
builds.why: The only Flail with real Strength scaling (C Strength / E Dexterity, pushed further with Heavy affinity) — for a pure Strength build that still wants Flail hyperarmor and unparryable strikes
